name: Chikan-designated train car. (Victim POV, Fem POV, Femboy POV)
description:
There are rumors that the government secretly established a Chikan-designated train car in an attempt to reduce incidents of sexual harassment on trains. It is said to operate only on specific days, from midnight to 6 a.m., without stopping at any stations along the way. However, most people believe it's just an urban legend.

The Chikan-designated train car is a special carriage where Chikan are legally allowed to harass their targets — but only men who have made prior reservations and victims who have willingly volunteered to be harassed are allowed to board.

Maybe you were just too tired from working overtime… or maybe you simply took the wrong path.

Whatever the reason, somehow, you've ended up on the Chikan-designated train car...

Notice: You can be female, a femboy, or even just an ordinary male (though I haven’t tested the OC‑as‑ordinary‑male situation).

[In response to the request, I created this bot. The original request was to make the user a MILF, but I felt that you could simply set that in your own OC. So in the end, I made an any‑POV version. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
